# Core scientific stack
numpy
scipy
einops

# Neural operators / config / experiment tracking
neuraloperator        # GINO / FNO reference implementation
hydra-core
omegaconf
wandb
tqdm

# Geometry: point clouds, meshes, SDF, IO
trimesh
pyvista
meshio
open3d                # heavier; pin/replace if Spartan build is troublesome
rtree                 # spatial index for trimesh signed-distance (SDF featuriser)
h5py

# FEM ground truth (pick per machine)
# fenics-dolfinx      # via conda-forge; uncomment when generating GT

# Plotting / analysis
matplotlib
scikit-learn

# Dev tooling
pytest
ruff
mypy
pre-commit
nbstripout
